name: whyll-agents
description: Laravel 13 specialist agents for WhylLima project - builders and fixers for full-stack, models, API layer, endpoints, tests, jobs, resources, seeders, events, JWT auth, ACL (config-driven + privilege escalation prevention), audit, Horizon, AI agents, MCP servers, and quality checking. PHP 8.3+, PHP attributes, domain folders, versioned API, Service-Repository pattern.
